title: Nursery Rhyme. CXXVIII. Scholastic.
content:
[A Greek bill of fare.]

        LEGOMOTON,
        Acapon,
        Alfagheuse,
        Pasti venison.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXXVIII. Scholastic." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
